## 💬 User #1

_2026-05-01 09:00:25Z_

## 修复 1：为所有 step 组件添加 direction prop（C2）

### 什么是 direction
`useStepPlayer` 已经追踪 `direction: "forward" | "backward"`，但步骤组件没有接收也没有使用这个值。`demo-shell.tsx` 也没有把 direction 传给 DemoStep.content。

### 需要修改的文件

**a) `components/knowledge/demo-shell.tsx`**

找到 `DemoStep` interface，确认 content 类型是 `ReactNode`（已有）。

这个文件不需要改 `DemoStep`，只需要在渲染 step content 时改为传入 direction。但是，因为 step content 是 `ReactNode`（已经是渲染好的 JSX），无法再注入 props。

正确的做法是：**把 `DemoStep.content` 从 `ReactNode` 改为 `(direction: "forward" | "backward") => ReactNode`**，这样 DemoShell 可以在渲染时传入当前 direction。

修改：

```typescript
// 在 DemoStep interface 里，把 content 类型改为函数
export interface DemoStep {
  labelZh: string;
  labelEn: string;
  content: (direction: "forward" | "backward") => ReactNode;
}
```

然后在 DemoShell 的渲染部分，找到渲染 `steps[currentStep].content` 的地方，改为：
```typescript
{steps[currentStep].content(direction)}
```

**b) `components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/index.tsx`**

把每个 step 的 content 从：
```tsx
content: <Step1Vdom isActive={currentStep === 0} />,
```
改为：
```tsx
content: (direction) => <Step1Vdom isActive={currentStep === 0} direction={direction} />,
```
对所有 6 个步骤做同样修改（使用对应的 Step 组件名）。

**c) 所有 6 个 step 组件** (`step-1-vdom.tsx` ~ `step-6-summary.tsx`)

每个组件的 `Props` interface 里已有 `isActive: boolean`，添加 `direction: "forward" | "backward"`：
```typescript
interface Props {
  isActive: boolean;
  direction: "forward" | "backward";
}
```
每个组件的函数签名也加上这个 prop（可以先不使用它，作为架构预留）：
```typescript
export function Step1Vdom({ isActive, direction }: Props) {
```

---

## 修复 2：深色模式代码块样式（I2）

### 问题

所有 step 组件的 `SyntaxHighlighter` 都硬编码了 `style={oneLight}`，深色模式下会显示白色代码块背景。

### 修改

在使用了 `SyntaxHighlighter` 的 step 组件里（step-1 ~ step-6，以及 step-3, step-4, step-5, step-6 有代码面板），都需要：

1. 在导入处新增 `oneDark` 导入：
```typescript
import { oneLight } from "react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism";
import { oneDark } from "react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism";
```

2. 通过 `useTheme` 读取当前主题（需要加 `"use client"` 指令，步骤组件已有）：
```typescript
import { useTheme } from "next-themes";
// 在组件内部：
const { resolvedTheme } = useTheme();
const codeStyle = resolvedTheme === "dark" ? oneDark : oneLight;
```

3. 替换 `style={oneLight}` 为 `style={codeStyle}`

**涉及文件：**
- `step-1-vdom.tsx` — 有代码块
- `step-2-same-level.tsx` — 有代码块
- `step-3-type-diff.tsx` — 有代码块
- `step-4-key.tsx` — 有代码块
- `step-5-list-diff.tsx` — 有代码块
- `step-6-summary.tsx` — 有代码块

---

## 修复 3：step-5 phase 状态在切换时不重置（I3）

### 问题

`step-5-list-diff.tsx` 里 `const [phase, setPhase] = useState(0)`，当用户切走后再切回来，phase 仍然是之前的值。

### 修改

在 `step-5-list-diff.tsx` 组件里，添加一个 `useEffect` 来在 isActive 变为 false 时（或 true 时）重置：

```typescript
import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
// ...

export function Step5ListDiff({ isActive, direction }: Props) {
  const [phase, setPhase] = useState(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isActive) setPhase(0);
  }, [isActive]);
  // ...
}
```

---

## 修复 4：_registry.ts 中不必要的 .then() shim（M1）

`index.tsx` 已经有 `export default ReactDiffDemo`，所以 `.then()` 映射是多余的。

在 `components/knowledge/demos/_registry.ts` 里，把：
```typescript
"react-diff": () =>
  import("./react-diff/index").then((m) => ({ default: m.ReactDiffDemo })),
```
改为：
```typescript
"react-diff": () => import("./react-diff/index"),
```

---

## 修复 5：step-player.tsx 的 "use client" 指令（M5）

`components/knowledge/step-player.tsx` 里删掉顶部的 `"use client"` 指令（hook 文件不需要这个）。

---

## 操作步骤

1. 先读取相关文件确认当前内容
2. 依次做以上修改
3. 运行 `npx tsc --noEmit` 确认零报错
4. Commit：`git add -A && git commit -m "fix(knowledge): direction prop, dark mode code blocks, phase reset"`

## 注意事项

- 步骤 1（demo-shell.tsx 的 `DemoStep.content` 改为函数类型）是最核心的改动，会触发 `index.tsx` 的编译报错直到你同步更新所有 step 组件的 content 为箭头函数格式
- 如果遇到 TypeScript 报错，先把所有相关文件都改完再运行检查
- `useTheme` 来自 `next-themes` 包，项目已安装

## 汇报格式

- 状态：DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED
- 每个修复的结果
- TypeScript 检查结果
- 最终 commit SHA

  "contents": "\"use client\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from \"react-syntax-highlighter\";\nimport { oneLight } from \"react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism\";\n\ninterface Props { isActive: boolean }\n\nconst code = `function reconcileChildFibers(\n  returnFiber,\n  currentFirstChild,\n  newChild\n) {\n  // ✅ 只处理同层节点，不跨层\n  if (isArray(newChild)) {\n    return reconcileChildrenArray(\n      returnFiber,\n      currentFirstChild,\n      newChild\n    );\n  }\n}`;\n\ntype NodeState = \"normal\" | \"matched\" | \"removed\" | \"added\";\n\nfunction VNode({\n  label,\n  state,\n  delay,\n  isActive,\n}: {\n  label: string;\n  state: NodeState;\n  delay: string;\n  isActive: boolean;\n}) {\n  const base = \"flex h-9 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border-[1.5px] font-mono text-xs font-semibold\";\n  const stateClass: Record<NodeState, string> = {\n    normal: \"border-border bg-background-secondary text-text-secondary\",\n    matched: \"border-green-500 bg-green-50 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-950 dark:text-green-400\",\n    removed: \"border-red-400 bg-red-50 text-red-600 line-through dark:bg-red-950 dark:text-red-400\",\n    added: \"border-amber-400 bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-400\",\n  };\n\n  const animClass: Record<NodeState, string> = {\n    normal: \"animate__animated animate__fadeInDown\",\n    matched: \"animate__animated animate__pulse\",\n    removed: \"animate__animated animate__shakeX\",\n    added: \"animate__animated animate__bounceIn\",\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <span\n      className={cn(base, stateClass[state], isActive ? animClass[state] : \"opacity-0\")}\n      style={{ animationDelay: delay }}\n    >\n      {label}\n    </span>\n  );\n}\n\nexport function Step2SameLevel({ isActive }: Props) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full gap-0\">\n      {/* 可视化区域 */}\n      <div className=\"flex flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-6 px-8 py-10 border-r border-border\">\n        <div className={cn(\"text-center\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n          <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 2 / 6</p>\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">同层比较策略</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-sm text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n            React 只对比同层级节点，不会跨层移动。<br />相同位置同类型节点复用，否则销毁重建。\n          </p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex items-start gap-10\">\n          {/* 旧树 */}\n          <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center gap-2\">\n            <p className=\"text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">旧树 Old</p>\n            <VNode label=\"<A>\" state=\"normal\" delay=\"0.1s\" isActive={isActive} />\n            <div className=\"h-4 w-px bg-border\" />\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <VNode label=\"<B>\" state=\"normal\" delay=\"0.2s\" isActive={isActive} />\n              <VNode label=\"<C>\" state=\"normal\" delay=\"0.3s\" isActive={isActive} />\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 箭头 */}\n          <div\n            className={cn(\"pt-8 text-2xl text-border\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}\n            style={{ animationDelay: \"0.4s\" }}\n          >\n            ⟶\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 新树 */}\n          <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center gap-2\">\n            <p className=\"text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">新树 New</p>\n            <VNode label=\"<A>\" state=\"matched\" delay=\"0.5s\" isActive={isActive} />\n            <div className=\"h-4 w-px bg-border\" />\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n              <VNode label=\"<B>\" state=\"matched\" delay=\"0.6s\" isActive={isActive} />\n              <VNode label=\"<D>\" state=\"added\" delay=\"0.75s\" isActive={isActive} />\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 新增 E */}\n          <div\n            className={cn(\"flex flex-col items-center gap-2 self-end\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}\n            style={{ animationDelay: \"0.9s\" }}\n          >\n            <p className=\"text-[10px] tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">新增</p>\n            <VNode label=\"<E>\" state=\"added\" delay=\"1s\" isActive={isActive} />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 图例 */}\n        <div\n          className={cn(\"flex gap-5 text-[11px]\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}\n          style={{ animationDelay: \"1.1s\" }}\n        >\n          {(\n            [\n              [\"#22c55e\", \"复用节点\"],\n              [\"#ef4444\", \"销毁重建\"],\n              [\"#f59e0b\", \"新增节点\"],\n            ] as const\n          ).map(([color, label]) => (\n            <span key={label} className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 text-text-secondary\">\n              <span\n                className=\"h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-sm border-[1.5px]\"\n                style={{ borderColor: color, background: color + \"20\" }}\n              />\n              {label}\n            </span>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 代码面板 */}\n      <div className=\"w-72 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background-secondary p-5\">\n        <p className=\"mb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">核心源码</p>\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n          <SyntaxHighlighter\n            language=\"javascript\"\n            style={oneLight}\n            customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"11px\", background: \"transparent\" }}\n          >\n            {code}\n          </SyntaxHighlighter>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 154
}

\"animate__animated animate__fadeInLeft\" : \"opacity-0\"\n          )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.5s\" }}>\n            <p className=\"mb-2 text-xs font-semibold text-red-700 dark:text-red-400\">❌ 类型不同 — 销毁重建</p>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4 font-mono text-sm\">\n              <span className={cn(\n                \"rounded border border-red-400 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-red-600\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__flipOutX\" : \"\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.8s\" }}>&lt;div&gt;</span>\n              <span className=\"text-text-secondary\">→</span>\n              <span className={cn(\n                \"rounded border border-amber-400 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-amber-700\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__flipInX\" : \"\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"1.1s\" }}>&lt;span&gt;</span>\n              <span className=\"text-xs text-red-600\">整棵子树卸载 + 重新挂载</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 警告提示 */}\n          <div className={cn(\n            \"rounded-xl border border-border bg-background-secondary p-3 text-xs text-text-secondary\",\n            isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n          <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 4 / 6</p>\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">key 的作用</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-sm text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n            key 帮助 React 识别同层列表中哪些节点是同一个，从而精准复用，避免不必要的 DOM 操作。\n          </p>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex w-full max-w-xl gap-6\">\n          {/* 无 key */}\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <p className={cn(\n              \"mb-2 text-xs font-semibold text-red-600\",\n              isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n            )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.1s\" }}>❌ 无 key — 按索引</p>\n            <div className=\"space-y-1.5\">\n              {items.map((item, i) => (\n                <div\n                  key={item.key}\n                  className={cn(\n                    \"rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-red-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-red-700\",\n                    \"dark:border-red-900 dark:bg-red-950 dark:text-red-400\",\n                    isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInLeft\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                  )}\n                  style={{ animationDelay: `${0.2 + i * 0.15}s` }}\n                >\n                  <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary mr-2\">index={i}</span>\n                  {item.label}\n                </div>\n              ))}\n              <p className={cn(\n                \"text-[10px] text-red-500 mt-1\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.7s\" }}>\n                头部插入 → 3 个节点全部更新\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 有 key */}\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <p className={cn(\n              \"mb-2 text-xs font-semibold text-green-600\",\n              isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n            )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.1s\" }}>✅ 有 key — 精准匹配</p>\n            <div className=\"space-y-1.5\">\n              {/* 新增的 Orange */}\n              <div\n                className={cn(\n                  \"rounded-lg border border-amber-300 bg-amber-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-amber-700\",\n                  \"dark:border-amber-800 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-400\",\n                  isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__bounceIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                )}\n                style={{ animationDelay: \"0.9s\" }}\n              >\n                <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary mr-2\">key=&quot;c&quot; 🆕</span>\n                🍊 Orange\n              </div>\n              {/* 复用的 Apple & Banana */}\n              {items.slice(0, 2).map((item, i) => (\n                <div\n                  key={item.key}\n                  className={cn(\n                    \"rounded-lg border border-green-200 bg-green-50 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-green-700\",\n                    \"dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-950 dark:text-green-400\",\n                    isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInLeft\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                  )}\n                  style={{ animationDelay: `${0.3 + i * 0.15}s` }}\n                >\n                  <span className=\"text-[10px] text-text-secondary mr-2\">key=&quot;{item.key}&quot; ♻️</span>\n                  {item.label}\n                </div>\n              ))}\n              <p className={cn(\n                \"text-[10px] text-green-600 mt-1\",\n                isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n              )} style={{ animationDelay: \"1.1s\" }}>\n                头部插入 → 仅 Orange 新建，其余复用\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 代码面板 */}\n      <div className=\"w-72 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background-secondary p-5\">\n        <p className=\"mb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">核心源码</p>\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n          <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"jsx\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"11px\", background: \"transparent\" }}>\n            {code}\n          </SyntaxHighlighter>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

{
  "contents": "// components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/step-5-list-diff.tsx\n\"use client\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from \"react-syntax-highlighter\";\nimport { oneLight } from \"react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism\";\n\ninterface Props { isActive: boolean }\n\nconst code = `// React 列表 Diff 两轮策略\n// 第一轮：顺序扫描，处理头部连续可复用节点\n// 第二轮：建 key Map，O(1) 查找乱序可复用节点\n\nfunction reconcileChildrenArray(\n  returnFiber, currentFirstChild, newChildren\n) {\n  let oldFiber = currentFirstChild;\n  let newIdx = 0;\n\n  // 第一轮：头部顺序扫描\n  for (; oldFiber && newIdx < newChildren.length; newIdx++) {\n    const newChild = newChildren[newIdx];\n    if (!canReuseNode(oldFiber, newChild)) break;\n    placeChild(updateSlot(oldFiber, newChild), newIdx);\n    oldFiber = oldFiber.sibling;\n  }\n\n  // 第二轮：用 Map 处理乱序节点\n  const existingChildren = mapRemainingChildren(oldFiber);\n  for (; newIdx < newChildren.length; newIdx++) {\n    const matchedFiber = existingChildren.get(\n      newChildren[newIdx].key ?? newIdx\n    );\n    // 找到可复用节点或新建\n  }\n}`;\n\nconst oldNodes = [\"A\", \"B\", \"C\", \"D\"] as const;\nconst newOrder = [\n  { key: \"A\", status: \"reuse\" as const },\n  { key: \"D\", status: \"move\" as const },\n  { key: \"B\", status: \"reuse\" as const },\n  { key: \"E\", status: \"new\" as const },\n];\n\nconst statusStyle: Record<string, string> = {\n  reuse: \"border-green-400 bg-green-50 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-950 dark:text-green-400\",\n  move: \"border-blue-400 bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 dark:bg-blue-950 dark:text-blue-400\",\n  new: \"border-amber-400 bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 dark:bg-amber-950 dark:text-amber-400\",\n};\n\nexport function Step5ListDiff({ isActive }: Props) {\n  const [phase, setPhase] = useState(0);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full gap-0\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-center gap-6 px-8 py-10 border-r border-border\">\n        <div className={cn(\"text-center\", isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\")}>\n          <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 5 / 6</p>\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">列表 Diff 优化</h2>\n          <p className=\"mt-2 max-w-sm text-sm text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">\n            React 用顺序扫描 + key Map 两轮策略，在 O(n) 时间内完成列表节点的复用匹配。\n          </p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 旧列表 */}\n        <div className=\"w-full max-w-md\">\n          <p className={cn(\n            \"mb-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\",\n            isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n          )}>旧列表</p>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n            {oldNodes.map((n, i) => (\n              <div\n                key={n}\n                className={cn(\n                  \"flex h-10 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-border\",\n                  \"bg-background-secondary font-mono text-sm font-bold text-text-primary\",\n                  isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInDown\" : \"opacity-0\"\n                )}\n                style={{ animationDelay: `${0.1 + i * 0.1}s` }}\n              >\n                {n}\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 步骤按钮 */}\n        <div className={cn(\n          \"flex gap-3\",\n          isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n        )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.6s\" }}>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setPhase(1)}\n            className={cn(\n              \"rounded-lg border border-border px-3 py-1.5 text-xs transition-all hover:border-muted-foreground/50\",\n              phase >= 1 ? \"bg-text-primary text-background\" : \"text-text-secondary\"\n            )}\n          >\n            第一轮：顺序扫描\n          </button>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setPhase(2)}\n            className={cn(\n              \"rounded-lg border border-border px-3 py-1.5 text-xs transition-all hover:border-muted-foreground/50\",\n              phase >= 2 ? \"bg-text-primary text-background\" : \"text-text-secondary\"\n            )}\n          >\n            第二轮：key Map 匹配\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* 新列表结果（第二阶段出现） */}\n        {phase >= 2 && (\n          <div className=\"w-full max-w-md\">\n            <p className=\"mb-2 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">新列表（结果）</p>\n            <div className=\"flex gap-2 flex-wrap\">\n              {newOrder.map((n, i) => (\n                <div\n                  key={n.key}\n                  className={cn(\n                    \"flex h-10 w-14 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border font-mono text-sm font-bold\",\n                    statusStyle[n.status],\n                    \"animate__animated animate__bounceIn\"\n                  )}\n                  style={{ animationDelay: `${i * 0.12}s` }}\n                >\n                  {n.key}\n                  <span className=\"ml-0.5 text-[8px]\">\n                    {n.status === \"new\" ? \"🆕\" : n.status === \"move\" ? \"↕\" : \"♻\"}\n                  </span>\n                </div>\n              ))}\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"mt-2 flex gap-4 text-[10px] text-text-secondary\">\n              <span>♻ 原地复用</span>\n              <span>↕ 移动复用</span>\n              <span>🆕 新建</span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 代码面板 */}\n      <div className=\"w-72 shrink-0 overflow-y-auto bg-background-secondary p-5\">\n        <p className=\"mb-3 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">核心源码</p>\n        <div className=\"rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden text-xs\">\n          <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"javascript\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"10px\", background: \"transparent\" }}>\n            {code}\n          </SyntaxHighlighter>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

{
  "contents": "// components/knowledge/demos/react-diff/step-6-summary.tsx\n\"use client\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from \"react-syntax-highlighter\";\nimport { oneLight } from \"react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism\";\n\ninterface Props { isActive: boolean }\n\nconst summaryPoints = [\n  { icon: \"🌳\", title: \"Virtual DOM\", desc: \"JS 对象描述 UI，render 前先在内存 diff，再批量更新真实 DOM\" },\n  { icon: \"↔\", title: \"同层比较\", desc: \"只比较同一层级，不跨层移动，O(n) 时间复杂度\" },\n  { icon: \"🔄\", title: \"类型判断\", desc: \"类型相同复用 Fiber，类型不同销毁整棵子树后重建\" },\n  { icon: \"🔑\", title: \"key 优化\", desc: \"key 唯一标识列表节点，头部插入只需 1 次 DOM 操作\" },\n  { icon: \"📋\", title: \"列表 Diff\", desc: \"顺序扫描 + key Map 两轮策略，最大化节点复用\" },\n] as const;\n\nconst finalCode = `// React Diff 三大假设\n// 1. Web UI 中跨层级移动操作极少 → 只做同层比较\n// 2. 类型不同的组件生成不同结构 → 直接替换\n// 3. 开发者用 key 标识同层节点 → key 驱动列表优化\n\n// 整体时间复杂度：O(n)（传统 diff 是 O(n³)）`;\n\nexport function Step6Summary({ isActive }: Props) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-full flex-col items-center overflow-y-auto px-8 py-10\">\n      <div className={cn(\n        \"mb-8 text-center\",\n        isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeIn\" : \"opacity-0\"\n      )}>\n        <p className=\"mb-1 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest text-text-secondary\">步骤 6 / 6</p>\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg font-bold text-text-primary\">完整流程回顾</h2>\n        <p className=\"mt-2 text-sm text-text-secondary\">React Diff 的三大假设 + 五个核心策略</p>\n      </div>\n\n      <div className=\"grid w-full max-w-2xl grid-cols-1 gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 mb-8\">\n        {summaryPoints.map((p, i) => (\n          <div\n            key={p.title}\n            className={cn(\n              \"rounded-xl border border-border bg-background-secondary p-4\",\n              isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInUp\" : \"opacity-0\"\n            )}\n            style={{ animationDelay: `${0.1 + i * 0.1}s` }}\n          >\n            <div className=\"mb-2 text-xl\">{p.icon}</div>\n            <p className=\"mb-1 text-sm font-semibold text-text-primary\">{p.title}</p>\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-text-secondary leading-relaxed\">{p.desc}</p>\n          </div>\n        ))}\n      </div>\n\n      <div className={cn(\n        \"w-full max-w-2xl rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden\",\n        isActive ? \"animate__animated animate__fadeInUp\" : \"opacity-0\"\n      )} style={{ animationDelay: \"0.7s\" }}>\n        <SyntaxHighlighter language=\"javascript\" style={oneLight} customStyle={{ margin: 0, fontSize: \"12px\", background: \"var(--secondary-bg)\" }}>\n          {finalCode}\n        </SyntaxHighlighter>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 64
}

{
  "contents": "// components/knowledge/step-player.tsx\n\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\n\nexport interface StepPlayerState {\n  currentStep: number;\n  totalSteps: number;\n  direction: \"forward\" | \"backward\";\n  goTo: (step: number) => void;\n  next: () => void;\n  prev: () => void;\n  isFirst: boolean;\n  isLast: boolean;\n}\n\nexport function useStepPlayer(totalSteps: number): StepPlayerState {\n  const [currentStep, setCurrentStep] = useState(0);\n  const [direction, setDirection] = useState<\"forward\" | \"backward\">(\"forward\");\n\n  const goTo = useCallback(\n    (step: number) => {\n      if (step < 0 || step >= totalSteps) return;\n      setDirection(step > currentStep ? \"forward\" : \"backward\");\n      setCurrentStep(step);\n    },\n    [currentStep, totalSteps]\n  );\n\n  const next = useCallback(() => goTo(currentStep + 1), [currentStep, goTo]);\n  const prev = useCallback(() => goTo(currentStep - 1), [currentStep, goTo]);\n\n  return {\n    currentStep,\n    totalSteps,\n    direction,\n    goTo,\n    next,\n    prev,\n    isFirst: currentStep === 0,\n    isLast: currentStep === totalSteps - 1,\n  };\n}\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 44
}
